synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23312 Oracle Linux 9 java-1.8.0-openjdk bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23312
description:
[1:1.8.0.472.b08-2.0.1]
- Add Oracle vendor bug URL [Orabug: 34340155]

[1:1.8.0.472.b08-2]
- Bump rpmrelease for CentOS build
- Add scripts to handle tagging of portable-based RPMs
- Related: RHEL-118767
- Related: RHEL-119455
- Related: RHEL-118775
full_text:
